creator: jason.harmening@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

Only a src commit bit, not ports.   I forgot to log out of bugzilla with my freebsd.org email and log back in w/ my gmail adddress, so that's why it looks like a committer/non-maintainer update.

It does pass portlint and local testing on 12-stable and 13-current amd64 (no poudriere as my zfs pool is almost out of space).
